name: blueconic-mcp
description: Connect Claude to your BlueConic CDP to explore segments, profiles, connections, dialogues, and more.
long_description: Access your BlueConic Customer Data Platform directly from Claude. Query segments, browse profiles, inspect connections, view dialogues, explore lifecycle stages, and analyze your customer data — all through natural conversation.

client_id.title: OAuth Client ID
client_id.description: Client ID from BlueConic Settings > Access Management > Applications

client_secret.title: OAuth Client Secret
client_secret.description: Client Secret from BlueConic Settings > Access Management > Applications
